title: Incorrect Result of Cascading Module Using Generate Statement

features.name: local wire array for cascading carry in generate block
features.description: Code should include a generate block containing a local wire array declaration that is used to connect module instantiation outputs to inputs across loop iterations

features.name: cascaded module instantiation with carry chaining via genvar loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop using genvar that instantiates modules where each instance's input port receives the output port of the previous iteration

features.name: ripple carry adder using generate cascaded full adders
features.description: Code should include a ripple carry adder structure where each full adder stage takes carry output from the previous stage as its carry input, built using generate statements
